loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing this-month cumulative energy for PRIMARY outgoing feeders (UPS-07, UPS-08, UPS-10, UPS-11, UPS-12); BPDB feeders are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy — per-feeder breakdown is aggregated from member meters (UPS-07, UPS-08, UPS-10, UPS-11, UPS-12) which have data; BPDB feeders are dark and omitted from the trend.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing total apparent power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) from outgoing feeders; capacity and load-factor metrics are honest-blanked because the panel's rated_kva is unknown and load factor is not measured on member meters.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDP demand trends by feeder; Load Factor and Critical Threshold are omitted as they require unavailable nameplate/energy data for this panel aggregate.
